name: Creole Chili Con Carne
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet; saute onion, celery, and bell pepper until golden.
2. Stir in beef; saute until red color disappears.
3. Stir in flour; add kidney beans, water, salt, hot pepper sauce, and steak sauce.
4. Simmer, stirring often, until desired thickness.
5. Serve with crackers or rice.
